title: Make install.sh exit cleanly on non-Linux + redirect

context.goal: On Windows-via-WSL or macOS, give actionable redirect instead of opaque die.

steps: Replace the hard die line with a case statement on uname -s
Linux -> proceed; Darwin -> die with message about macOS not yet supported (point to roadmap); MINGW*|MSYS*|CYGWIN* -> die with message: 'Use install.ps1 from PowerShell on Windows.'
acceptance: install.sh on Linux behaves identically to current
install.sh under Git Bash on Windows prints PowerShell instructions and exits 1
